scripts.network: hc sandbox clean && bun run build:happ && UI_PORT=${UI_PORT:-8880} AGENTS=${AGENTS:-2} concurrently "bun run --filter ui start" "bun run launch:happ" "hc playground"
scripts.test: bun run test:sweettest && bun t -w ui
scripts.test:sweettest: bun run build:happ && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/native-tests cargo test -p requests_and_offers_sweettest
scripts.test:sweettest:verbose: bun run build:happ && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/native-tests cargo test -p requests_and_offers_sweettest -- --nocapture
scripts.test:sweettest:misc: bun run build:happ && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/native-tests cargo test -p requests_and_offers_sweettest --test misc
scripts.test:sweettest:users: bun run build:happ && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/native-tests cargo test -p requests_and_offers_sweettest --test users
scripts.test:sweettest:administration: bun run build:happ && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/native-tests cargo test -p requests_and_offers_sweettest --test administration
scripts.test:sweettest:organizations: bun run build:happ && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/native-tests cargo test -p requests_and_offers_sweettest --test organizations
scripts.test:sweettest:service-types: bun run build:happ && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/native-tests cargo test -p requests_and_offers_sweettest --test service_types
scripts.test:sweettest:requests: bun run build:happ && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/native-tests cargo test -p requests_and_offers_sweettest --test requests
scripts.test:sweettest:offers: bun run build:happ && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/native-tests cargo test -p requests_and_offers_sweettest --test offers
scripts.test:sweettest:mediums-of-exchange: bun run build:happ && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/native-tests cargo test -p requests_and_offers_sweettest --test mediums_of_exchange
scripts.package: bun run build:happ && VITE_MOCK_BUTTONS_ENABLED=false VITE_PEERS_DISPLAY_ENABLED=false bun --filter ui package && hc web-app pack workdir --recursive
scripts.build:happ: bun run build:zomes && hc app pack workdir --recursive
scripts.check: cd ui && bun run check && bun run lint
